sentences.text: The Miller was surprised and said, 'Hans, I am surprised at you because friendship never forgets.'
He added, 'That is the wonderful thing about friendship, but maybe you don't understand the beauty of life.'
Then, he noticed Hans's flowers and said, 'How lovely your primroses are looking, by the way!'
Hans agreed, saying, 'They are certainly very lovely, and I am lucky to have so many of them.'
